description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On November 5, 2024 at 08:56 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in San Francisco, California was in a 
collision involving a shipping container that was being hauled by a pickup truck on Murray Street at Genebern Way. The Waymo AV was 
traveling north on Genebern Way in autonomous mode when it came to a stop at a stop sign to prepare to make a left turn onto westbound 
Murray Street. Immediately after, a pickup truck (hauling a gooseneck trailer carrying a shipping container) that had been traveling east on 
Murray Street came to a stop at a stop sign at the intersection with Genebern Way. While the pickup truck remained stopped, the Waymo 
AV proceeded through the intersection. As the Waymo AV was making a left turn through the intersection, the pickup truck entered the 
intersection to make a right turn onto southbound Genebern Way. After the Waymo AV partially entered westbound Murray Street, it came 
to a stop to yield to the pickup truck. The Waymo AV test driver then transitioned to manual mode. A moment later, while the Waymo AV 
remained stopped, the rear left corner of the shipping container made contact with the front driver side of the Waymo AV. At the time of the 
impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. The Waymo AV 
sustained damage. 
Print
Clear Form
